tracks.meaning: the forward-facing part of a person's head, including the face and forehead
the forward or leading edge of a weather system, such as a cold front or warm front
the foremost line of battle or the area where opposing forces directly engage
the facade or exterior face of a building, especially the side facing a street
the forward direction or the position ahead of someone or something
a respectable or legitimate appearance concealing illegal or dishonest activity
the public face or visible representation of an organization or operation
the part of a stage closest to the audience
the forward part of a ship or the bow area
the forward line of players in sports like rugby or American football
to face or confront a problem or challenge directly
to serve as the public representative or spokesperson of an organization
to take responsibility for a task or assume a leadership position in a legal or formal sense
